categories.description: Creativity. Simple linear regression scores high; weird, complex, completely vibe-coded LSTM scores low.

categories.name: Asset Integration
categories.description: How well did they combine all 3 or 2 assets.

categories.name: Dashboard and Graphs: Usability
categories.description: Does the dashboard actually make sense?

categories.name: Dashboard and Graphs: Quality
categories.description: How much do you like the presentation? Are they reading off a script? Does it look like they know what they are talking about?

performance_scoring.description: 50 points based on PnL, tiebreaker is Sharpe Ratio. Judges have no influence over this portion.

categories.name: Problem Clarity and Significance
categories.description: Problem is well-defined, weighted, and tied to affected populations.

categories.name: Solution Creativity and Novelty
categories.description: Solution goes beyond existing alternatives rather than lightly remixing them.

categories.name: Project Feasibility and Implementation
categories.description: Realistically buildable with reasonable resources, not pure proof of concept.

categories.name: Pitch Quality and Delivery
categories.description: Succinct, engaging, visuals that elevate rather than distract from the verbal.

categories.name: Team Collaboration and Workload Balance
categories.description: Contributions feel egalitarian, each teammate owns a clear role.
